1.text: Uwah! I’m about to start a new school!!! I hope nobody bullies me like in my old school…. Gasp! Maybe I’ll even,....... find a girlfriend?!

2.text: You walk towards the school gate, and your eyes land on a very short and petite girl.

3.text: (Omg! She’s so kawaii!!! UWahhh, should I talk to her???)

4.text: Your eyes meet hers and she she smiles shyly back at you

5.text: Hey! You're on board cleaning duty today! Don't mess it up, or else I'l have to tell the teacher!

6.text:
(Omg, she's so fierce and sugoiii! I'm getting chills just listening to her! I feel so drawn...)
(Uwahhh... Who do I ask for directions??)

a.text: Compliment Kaicho-chans leadership skills and try to charm her with your incel skills!

b.text: Pet Uwa-chans ears and ask if she can show you to the classroom!

c.text: Ignore them and head to class.
